Description.value: Adds craftable and repairable Thermal Wear (clothingT1-T3) via craftingArmor skill with quality tier unlocks. Lightweight ingredient profile (ArmorCraftingKit + Cloth + Leather, Lv6 LegendaryParts for T3). Adds no stat buffs. Designed to replace Thermal Clothes Custom (Nexus 10229) which over-loaded MagazineSize/LootProb/MaxRange onto clothing slots.
